ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

Heading.helper: Optional. Main heading for this CTA section. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

Lead.helper: Optional. Supporting text under the heading. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
Lead.placeholder: Tell visitors why they should take the next step here.

CTA1Text.helper: Required. Text for the main CTA button. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

CTA1Icon.helper: Optional. Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building

CTA1Link.helper: Required. Select or enter the URL for the main CTA button.

CTA2Text.helper: Optional. Text for the secondary CTA button. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

CTA2Icon.helper: Optional. Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building

CTA2Link.helper: Optional. Select or enter the URL for the secondary CTA button.
